THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCURN, ROBERT L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAYSHORE CENTER II LLC. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT SMART & FINAL STORES, LLC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
